transcript: Speaker A: तू किती दिवसांपासून करतोयस? [How long have you been doing this?] Speaker B: कदाचित १०-१२ दिवस झाले असेल. [Maybe 10-12 days.] Speaker A: मग आता बेटर वाटतंय का? [Does it feel better now?] Speaker B: हो, I speak English very confidently now. [Yes, I speak English very confidently now.] Speaker A: ओ, भारी इंग्लिश बोलायला लागलास की! [Oh, you speak great English now!] Speaker C: MySivi ॲपवर १ कोटी लोक स्पोकन इंग्लिशची प्रॅक्टिस करतायत. तुम्ही पण आजच सुरू करा. ट्रायल फक्त १ रुपयात. [Over 1 crore people practice English on MySivi. Start today. Trial for just 1 rupee.]
on_screen_text: MySivi AI, Start English Learning - MySivi, 10M+ Downloads, MySivi Premium, LIMITED TIME OFFER, ₹1, Autopay, cancel anytime, 1,200 learners purchased today, 24/7 AI English Teacher, 500+ Exercises and Lessons, Unlimited Access
summary: A video call skit shows a boy demonstrating his improved English skills to a friend. The ad then promotes the MySivi app, highlighting its 10M+ downloads and a ₹1 premium trial.
